HGSS.462.0001:
Oops! I so sorry!
You not hurt, OK?\r
I very busy.\r
No time for talking with you.\r
Not good for me if seen by somebody.\f
HGSS.462.0002:
Oh no! You seen me already!\r
I make big mistake!\f
HGSS.462.0003:
Hey, you! Forget you see me, OK?
You seen, heard, known nothing, OK?\r
Bye!\r
Bye-bye a go-go!\f
HGSS.462.0004:
Sorry, I’ll be out for a while.
Misty, Gym Leader
HGSS.462.0005:
Since Misty’s out, we’ll be away, too.
Gym Trainers
HGSS.462.0007:
Cerulean City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Misty
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
HGSS.462.0008:
Misty: I was expecting you,
you pest!\f
You may have a lot of Johto Gym Badges,
but you’d better not take me\r
too lightly.\f
My Water-type Pokémon are tough!\f
HGSS.462.0009:
Misty: You really are good...\f
I’ll admit that you are skilled...\f
Here you go.
It’s the Cascade Badge.\f
HGSS.462.0010:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Cascade Badge from Misty!
HGSS.462.0011:
Misty: Here is another memento
from this battle. Take it!\f
HGSS.462.0012:
Misty: It contains the move
Water Pulse.\f
It can sometimes confuse your foe.\f
You’ve managed to defeat Trainers
all the way from Johto.\r
I’m sure you have a good use for it.
HGSS.462.0013:
Misty: Does Johto have a lot of
powerful Trainers?\f
I will someday go on my journey
to battle with powerful Trainers!
HGSS.462.0014:
Yo! Legend in the making!\f
Since Misty was away, I went out
for some fun, too.\r
He-he-he.
HGSS.462.0015:
Hoo, you showed me how tough you are.\f
As always, that was one great battle!
HGSS.462.0016:
...!\f
[0103,0000,0000] picked up the black item
that was by the pool.\f
It’s a Part from a machine!\f
